modalities.audio: Audio-only fixture where transcript reduction destroys the item.
modalities.document: Drawing, checklist, cut sheet, tag, or other document fixture.
modalities.image: Still synthetic or real image fixture.
modalities.text: Text-only scenario; scenario text may serve as a future photo shot list.
modalities.video: Video-only or animation fixture where frame reduction destroys the item.

modality_native_task_suffixes.A: Audio-native task where sound is the signal.
modality_native_task_suffixes.V: Video-native task where motion, timing, sequence, or cause-effect is the signal.

item_media_schema.confusable_with: Optional linked item id for deliberate confusable-pair reporting.
item_media_schema.expected_event_time: Optional ground-truth timestamp for temporal violations.
item_media_schema.expected_order: Optional expected event/procedure sequence for edit-distance grading.
item_media_schema.expected_rate: Optional ground-truth rate for dynamic video or audio phenomena.
item_media_schema.expected_sound_source: Optional source/component label for audio-native fault signatures.
item_media_schema.expected_value: Optional numeric ground truth for instrument readings or computed visual quantities.
item_media_schema.media: Array of media descriptors with type, path, alt, source, and license fields when fixtures are present.
item_media_schema.modality: Primary item modality. Existing v0.1/v2 generated items use text.
item_media_schema.reduction_test: Why transcript/frame reduction cannot preserve the answer.
item_media_schema.value_tolerance: Allowed absolute error for expected_value when the task asks for a numeric value.
